feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: crowd worforce generate registration link
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

i'm trying to learn the crowd workforce , so i followed the instruction in SAP help and tried to generate a link for the registration but it didn't work, could anyone help me ?

thank you

entry.title: CDS for Bill of material item and dependency.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have configured variant config in SAP S4HANA Public cloud system and maintain a super BOM in which dependencies are assigned to its components. 

Ex-- we have a KMAT material (A) and its variant materials (AB, AC, AD). when we check the BOM for material-A in CS13, super BOM is displayed with lets say 20 component. But when we check BOM for material-AB, only 5 components are displayed as per dependency assignment in super BOM.

Now the requirement is to create a report for details of BOM Component for variant material (which will show BOM details of AB, AC, AD.) I have checked in public cloud system but did not found any CDS where I can find a link between dependency and BOM item.

Is there any other CDS which I can use for this purpose.

Thanks.

entry.title: Caused by: EvalError: Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an all
entry.content: hi, I'm used QR code library in SAP my UI5 application.. it's worked for locally & deploy but in SAP Work Zone  i created tile for this application...it is not working ....getting error  like this "Caused by: EvalError: Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script in the following Content Security Policy directive: "script-src * data: blob:".  plz anyone help help me.

entry.title: SUPPLIER INVOICE LIST FOR WORKFLOW APPROVAL
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

how to check supplier invoices which are ready for workflow approval...?

Is there any specific t-code or app name that we can extract list from.

entry.title: Electronic Bank Statement Templates in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

To follow and test 1EG scope item, where we can find the bank statement templates (camt.052/53/54 or MT940) in SAP? In the "Manage Bank Statements" App, we can download the excel template only. 

Thanks for your kind response.

Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: Customer Payment Upload Program or Multiple Receipts from customer in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are now finding the solution of how to receive multiple incoming payments from customer in a day than using Automatic payment for Receivable in the system. Is there any upload or import function to upload the incoming payment like SO import or customer invoice import?

I really appreciate for your advice.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: ECC & SDI Integraion with HANA Cloud "Compatibility of SDI Integration with ECC 7.0 System"
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently using an ECC 7.0 system and would like to know if it is possible to perform SDI integration with HANA Cloud with this version. Is the SDI version compatible or supportive for integration with ECC 7.0?

Please suggest.

Thank you in advance for your support

entry.title: HANA Public Cloud validation _Precondition field/ function ( SYST-BATCH <> 'X AND SYST-BINPT <> )
entry.content:
Hello All,

Our client requires us to create a validation in the HANA Public Cloud based on the precondition field/function (SYST-BATCH <> 'X' AND SYST-BINPT <> 'X'). However, we could not find this field/function in the HANA Public Cloud.

Please assist us in understanding how we can achieve this validation in the HANA Public Cloud using the Manage Substitution/Validation app."

 

Thank you 

JP

entry.title: Couldn't choose user status profile in Create Technical Object app
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to assign user status profile and set the status manually in Create/Change technical object. But the field is read only even though I have given the "Maintenance planner" role. In addition, maybe related with this business catalog, EAM - Technical Object (SAP_EAM_BC_TO_MC). I couldn't also see this catalog as well in the system. Please guide me how I can define the status profile. Please kindly see the attachment also.

 

Thanks for your advice.

 

Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: Issues with Master Data Transfer from ERP HANA Cloud to DM
entry.content:
Dear Members,

 

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to seek your assistance regarding some issues I've encountered while transferring master data from ERP HANA Cloud to Digital Manufacturing (DM).

FYI, I am using DM TDD, HANA Cloud Demo.

 

Issue 1: Missing BOM Information in Routing

According to the documentation, transferring the master routing should update the Bill of Materials (BOM) in DM as well. However, in DM, the BOM information is missing from the routing. I used the Replicate by Object Selection app in ERP HANA Cloud, selecting "Production Bill of Operations" as 'Business Object Type' to transfer the routing to DM. Despite BOM and Production Version being already created in HANA Cloud, the BOM information is not reflected in the routing within DM.

 

 

Issue 2: Excessive Creation of BOM and Routing

Another issue has surfaced concerning the creation of Production Orders. After generating and releasing a Production Order, it correctly reaches DM. Although the BOM does not download to DM, the routing does. However, for each order sent to DM, BOM and routing seem to be created again by accumulation within DM, leading to an excessive number of BOMs and routings.

 

Could you please provide guidance or suggest any solutions to address these issues?

Thank you in advance for your support.

 

Best regards,

Wonpyo

 

SAP HANA Cloud SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Integrating SAP IBP data with Azure data lake
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently working on integrating SAP IBP with our Azure data platform to retrieve specific planning area and version data for our analytical dashboards. Could you please advise on which HANA tables would provide these details? Are there any standard tables available that store this information?

Thank you for your guidance.

Thank you

Prasad

entry.title: Warning message while converting planned order to purchase requsition
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I was converting planned order to purchase requsition ,it showing me warning message "Regard the export control protocol!"

It is YM721 message

Please provide advice.

entry.title: What are post-conversion/upgrade from ECC to S4 HANA PM & CS module Activities ?
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

I need your help, if anyone can share with me, what Activities to be taken care post-conversion/upgrade whilst taking up ECC to S/4 HANA 2023 in an Upgrade Project, for Plant Maintenance & Customer Service modules ?

Need your help as early as possible, please.

Have a Great Day, everyone...

Sincere Regards,

Keyur.

entry.title: How to drill down on date while working on Live Modelling?
entry.content:
I’m currently working on a live modeling exercise where I'm exposing a calculation view that is created in the CAPM application using Business Application Studio. Afterward, I fetched those views in SAP Analytics Cloud where several fields of type Date/DateTime/Timestamp in these views. However, I'm encountering an issue where I cannot utilize the drill-down option of granularity of Year-Quarter-Month in reporting.

Could you please assist me with this? I’d appreciate any guidance on how to enable drill-down functionality for these fields.

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Custom Entity does not display all line items
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I have created a custom entity based on Maintenance order i_maintenanceordertp and Operation I_Maintenanceorderoperationtp to get the measuring point based.

when i execute the custom entity i get only 20 records i am not able to get all the records in display 

i have written following code 

DATA(top) = CONV i( io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( ) ).

DATA(lv_skip) = CONV i( io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( ) ).

DATA(lv_max_rec) = top + lv_skip.

 

and using lv_max_rec in my select

SELECT *

FROM i_maintenanceordertp WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS

WHERE (lv_conditions)

ORDER BY maintenanceorder

INTO TABLE @@DATAlt_mo) UP TO @lv_max_rec ROWS. " OFFSET @LV_skip.

Please help and guide me at your earliest to get all the rows displayed in the output.

Thanks for your help and quick guidance.  
Nitin

entry.title: HANA On-Prem to HANA Cloud Datalake without HANA Cloud DB
entry.content: We are attempting to import a table from our HANA On-Premise database to HANA Datalake. We have successfully created a Remote Server and can view the tables of the HANA On-Premise database in HANA Datalake using the query CALL sp_remote_tables('remote_server_name'). We can also retrieve the columns of a specific table of HANA On-Premise using the query CALL sp_remote_columns (''). However, we are unable to fetch the table data. Our goal is to create a virtual table in HANA Datalake and directly import the table data from HANA On-Premise, without using HANA Cloud DB as an intermediary. Could someone please assist us in achieving this?"

entry.title: Re: SAP PI Sensitive data Interface
entry.content: how to achieve same in sap cpi

entry.title: Plant Maintenance & Customer Service - upgrade or conversion from ECC EHP6 to S4 HANA 2023
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

I need your quick help, please.

We are on an upgrade/conversion project, from ECC EHP6 to S4 HANA 2023.

I need help for - what would be Plant Maintenance & Customer Service activities that needs to be done post upgrade, after upgrade... I mean, any config, etc... post upgrade ?

I need quick help, please.

Have a Great Day...

entry.title: How to get UUID of WBS element using API in s4hana cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to create Project Demand (Resources) using external Web Service API.

The API I used is this one.

And in this API, one of the mandatory field WBS element is needed to enter as UUID value (ReferencedObjectUUID).

So, to able to retrieve UUID of WBS element, we will need to use WBS element API and WBS element APIs are depracted.

So, I used Enterprise Project API instead and able to retrieve WBS element UUID of Project Element ID by using /A_EnterpriseProjectElement entity with get method.

 

But the problem here is that the API can retrieve only UUID of Project Element IDs as WBS element UUID.

*Green highlighted one is Parent Project ID and yellow highlighted are Project Element IDs.

And when I want to choose Parent Project ID (Test260801) as WBS element, the API can only show Parent Project UUID and cannot retrieve UUID of that Parent Project ID as WBS element UUID.

And when I enter the Parent Project UUID in ReferencedObjectUUID field, "WBS element does not exist" error occurs.

Parent Project UUID

Error

So, I would like to know that how can I retrieve UUID of Parent Project ID as WBS element UUID using API (or) is there any workaround that is possible to do so?

If you have any experience (or) idea about this case, could you please kindly answer for me.

 

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Password policy update on SAP netweaver
entry.content:
Hi all, anyone could answer this. If I apply a new password policy in SAP NetWeaver such as the minimum password length, expiration time, password history size, and maximum idle time, it will have affect in any integrated systems users like those using the CUST_USER_ADMIN_ROLE that access the HANA database, etc?

Does it force to update their own password?

Thank you,

Best regards,

-Jaspher
